RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0002 Page 4 of 5 Statement of Account — continued Transaction Running Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 17/04/2025 UTILITY BILL 619 - 8,292 28/07/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 134 2,357 10,515 02/07/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - - 10,515 25/09/2025 UTILITY BILL 658 - 9,857 01/06/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - 1,266 11,123 20/05/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - 597 11,720 25/01/2025 UTILITY BILL - 348 12,068 11/09/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - - 12,068 22/08/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 580 - 11,488 11/02/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 131 - 11,357 21/03/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 11,357 20/09/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 11,357 15/12/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - 778 12,135 02/11/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 12,135 05/07/2025 UTILITY BILL 405 - 11,730 15/02/2025 UTILITY BILL 888 - 10,842 Verify income
